title: Run 19: persistent param file + sentence decomposition, multi-epoch convergence
description: Merges Run 16 (persistent direction_params.json + label-driven param nudging across epochs) with Run 18 (sentence-level decomposition of verbatim abstracts + per-atom saturation + sparsest cross-paper pairing). Inherits the Run 17 transparency layer (reasoning_trace on every decision; AGENT 5 reasoning-auditor) and the Run 16 4 gates UNCHANGED. CONVERGENCE TARGET = SEARCH QUALITY (label-driven, has ground truth), NOT 'find a niche' (degenerate reward). Both metrics (avg_search_quality delta, avg_paper_hits delta) and the niche verdict are reported SEPARATELY and honestly (R12).

persistent_file.rule: R10: READ at epoch start, WRITE at epoch end. Carries epoch number, the 5 params, lagged labeled_examples, and epoch_history.

search_quality.definition: avg_search_quality = sum_k(param_k * mean_dim_k) / sum_k(param_k), over all real search queries this epoch. Each query is scored on 5 deterministic [0,1] dimensions (AGENT 5). This is the convergence signal; it has ground truth via human labels (on_target vs diverge) applied with a one-epoch lag.

param_update.rule: at epoch START, consume lagged labeled_examples: for each param, nudge by lr*(mean dim-score of on_target queries - mean dim-score of diverge queries), clamped [0.05,0.95]. No labels => no change (baseline epoch). Deterministic.
param_update.lag: labels for scored epoch N are applied at the start of epoch N+1

sourcing_method.rule: R9: atoms decomposed from the VERBATIM abstract WebSearch returns for 'arxiv <id> <title> abstract'. WebFetch 403s.

merge_schema.primary_quote: verbatim >=30-char substring of atom_a or atom_b

pair_selection.rule: cross-paper mechanism atoms ranked by combined per-atom paper-hits ASC; take 5 lowest
pair_selection.tie_break: lower max single-atom hits, then atom_id

gates.gate_4: Belinda strict (mechanism causal verb + >=30-char verbatim quote)

hard_rules.R1: agents SEQUENTIAL, each commits+pushes before next
hard_rules.R2: push after every agent; fail -> STOP+report
hard_rules.R5: record ONLY web_search results actually seen -- never fabricate
hard_rules.R6: [REPORT] verbatim raw (incl reasoning_traces, per-atom search, search_quality)
hard_rules.R9: atoms from WebSearch verbatim abstracts (fetch is 403)
hard_rules.R10: direction_params.json PERSISTS -- read at start, write at end
hard_rules.R11: if session long -> commit partial + report
hard_rules.R12: converge toward search_quality (has ground truth). Report search_quality delta + paper_hits delta + niche verdict SEPARATELY. Niche likely stays 0 (saturation) -- that is honest, not failure.
